generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. We need to empower our agencies to act decisively before threats materialize. The 2024 London attack showed what happens when we hesitate - 12 innocent lives lost because intelligence agencies couldn't share information fast enough. We can't afford these delays. #NationalSecurityFirst #EmpowerOurAgents
